scorecard_metadata.scoring_methodology: Evidence-backed maturity scoring. Score = weighted average of capability readiness × enterprise validation weight. No score is synthetic or aspirational.
scorecard_metadata.scale: 0-100. 80+ = Enterprise Ready. 60-79 = Conditional Ready (gaps must be documented). 40-59 = Proof of Concept. Below 40 = Not Demo-Ready.

domain_scores.title: Cyber Threat Intelligence

strengths: 104 confirmed pipeline runs — operational cadence proven
Production IOC extractor covering 10 IOC types
Confidence scoring and provenance methodology documented
gaps: IOC persistence store empty (data/ioc/ has 0 records)
ATT&CK coverage at 11 techniques — critical gap
Enrichment telemetry not confirmed in live state
Intelligence lifecycle not customer-visible

domain_scores.path_to_80: Expand ATT&CK to 50+ techniques. Persist IOC records. Run enrichment pipeline.

domain_scores.title: Detection Engineering

strengths: 210 Sigma rules generated — volume is enterprise-credible
detection_forge.py integrates with live feed manifest
gaps: 210 Sigma rules are hash-only — no behavioral detection rules
No KQL rules generated (Sentinel market gap)
No SPL rules generated (Splunk market gap)
Chronicle/QRadar not implemented
Detection Studio UI not confirmed live

domain_scores.path_to_80: Generate behavioral Sigma rules. Run detection_forge for KQL and SPL. Flag Chronicle/QRadar roadmap.

domain_scores.title: MITRE ATT&CK Operations

strengths: attck_intelligence_engine.py with sequence chaining and kill-chain reconstruction
gaps: CRITICAL: Only 11 of ~200 ATT&CK techniques covered (5.5%)
No attack path or sequence data files generated
No attack timeline data
Coverage heatmap not demo-ready

domain_scores.path_to_80: URGENT: Run attck_intelligence_engine against all 1003 STIX bundles. This is the single highest-impact action.

domain_scores.title: Graph Intelligence

gaps: CRITICAL: graph_stats.json shows edges: 0
30 nodes all of type 'technique' — no adversary/IOC nodes
No pivot data generated from 1003 STIX bundles
Graph UI (graph-ops-center.html) cannot demonstrate relationships

domain_scores.path_to_80: URGENT: Run graph edge generation pipeline. This is a hard blocker for Track 4 demo.

domain_scores.title: SOC Operations

strengths: SOC workspace, operations center, integrations pages all present
gaps: No active investigation records
No case management records
Alert state uses STIX bundle IDs (not analyst-readable)
Hunt workflows not evidenced
Dashboard live-data connection unconfirmed

domain_scores.path_to_80: Create 5 investigation records. Normalize alert format. Confirm dashboard live connections.

domain_scores.title: MSSP Operations

strengths: enterprise_tenant_isolation_engine.py with full RBAC and SLA enforcement logic
Revenue engine and billing infrastructure present
gaps: CRITICAL: data/tenants/ is empty — zero tenants provisioned
MSSP console not connected to live tenant data
No SLA records or monitoring
No billing records for demo tenants

domain_scores.path_to_80: Provision 3 demo tenants. Generate tenant-scoped data. Connect MSSP console to tenant API.

domain_scores.title: AI Security Operations

strengths: AI threat tracker and security hub pages present
Pipeline run #104 confirms AI-assisted CTI is operational
gaps: CRITICAL: AI telemetry = CI pipeline metrics, not runtime AI session data
No prompt risk records or governance events
Scope confusion: CTI-with-AI vs. AI system security
Presenting CI metrics as AI runtime telemetry in demo = fatal trust breach

domain_scores.path_to_80: Decide scope. If AI-assisted CTI: score is already 72. If AI system security: 18+ months of work. Be honest.

domain_scores.title: Enterprise Trust & Evidence

strengths: Explainable confidence engine with provenance methodology
gaps: Trust evidence not surfaced in live Trust Center dashboard
SOC 2 / ISO 27001 not evidenced

domain_scores.path_to_80: Wire trust-center.html to live audit APIs. Add SOC 2 roadmap.

domain_scores.title: API & Integration

strengths: Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec with tier model
JWT + API key auth with tier constants
gaps: SDK documentation incomplete
Redis provisioning unconfirmed in production

domain_scores.path_to_80: Already at 82. Add SDK quickstart. Confirm Redis in production.

readiness_by_customer_type.SMB_security_team: READY — API track alone delivers value
readiness_by_customer_type.mid_market_soc: CONDITIONAL — Fix SOC alerts and IOC persistence first
readiness_by_customer_type.enterprise_ciso_60min_demo: NOT READY — ATT&CK and Graph blockers must be resolved
readiness_by_customer_type.mssp_operator: NOT READY — Tenant provisioning is hard blocker

top_5_actions_by_roi.action: Run IOC extractor and persist to data/ioc/
